name: cloud
tagline: Dispatch table routing Claude to Browser Use Cloud API/SDK reference docs by topic (auth, sessions, webhooks, proxies, integrations).
verdict: Clear, well-scoped reference skill: concrete triggers, explicit negative trigger, compact SKILL.md that defers bulk content to on-demand reference files. Weak spots: no version/changelog signal, an 815-char description that reads as a feature-list wall rather than a terse dispatch signal, and unpinned SDK installs from standard registries.

highlights.summary: SDK installs from standard registries with no version pin; well-known packages so warning not fail.
Description runs ~815 chars across lines 4-15, a feature-list wall well past the ~500-char guidance.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
